title: New: Weekend" and "First day of the week" settings

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Excited to share that the ability to choose the day of the week is available on both the account level and the user level is not released!

How do “Weekend” and “First day of the week” settings work?

At the account level, admins can define:

  1. What is a weekend (and hence what is the first day of the week)
  2. Whether or not they would like to hide / show weekends

image1346×896 89 KB

Users can also define their weeks in profile settings. By default, users will see the pickers / widgets according to what their country considers to be the first day of the week, but they have the ability to override this in the My Profile section.

image617×613 31.7 KB

Have you tried out this feature? Is it helpful for you? Let me know in the comments below

posts.author: mkitagawa (Megan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! A few users in our org reported that date & timeline columns accurately adjusted to reflect their new profile settings, but the time tracking column did not. Is there a fix for this? Thanks!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Megan,

Thanks for bringing this up and the feedback. Will check with the team!

@amber

posts.author: amber (Amber from monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mkitagawa

Thanks for letting us know! I’ll check this with the team and let you know

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for posting about this! So far this works on our end
